title: Add end-to-end verification and release rehearsal
description: Source: plan Task 22. Scope: add executable E2E suites for public and admin apps, run contract/migration/logscan/release rehearsal, and document final cutover evidence.
design: Depends on migration, deploy docs, admin UIs, cache, and public APIs. Verification: npm run test:e2e, contract suite, migration dry run, ws-redaction-probe, logscan, release checklist.
acceptance_criteria: Public and admin E2E coverage matches approved plan; release rehearsal proves migration, write gate, rollback path, token redaction, and full replacement readiness.

title: Add Django data migration tool
description: Source: plan Task 20. Scope: implement production migration tool from Django/Postgres shape to Go schema, ID preservation, sequence reset, validation report, and rollback rehearsal data checks.
design: Depends on schema, contract harness, and public routes. Verification: migration integration tests, explicit-ID sequence tests, dry-run report.
acceptance_criteria: Migrated data preserves frontend-visible IDs/relationships/media paths; sequence checks pass after explicit IDs; migration report names any rejected rows.

title: Add admin API roles and comments
description: Source: plan Task 14. Scope: implement /api/admin role enforcement, admin CRUD/query endpoints, and admin PR comment list/create/delete semantics for superuser/base_admin/editor/non-admin.
design: Depends on auth and public data routes. Verification: admin API tests for allowed/forbidden matrix, including comment moderation actions.
acceptance_criteria: Admin authorization is server-side; non-admin/anonymous are denied; editor/base_admin/superuser comment permissions match the approved plan.

title: Add pull request and REST comment routes
description: Source: plan Task 11. Scope: implement pull request CRUD/status routes and REST comment list/create/detail/update/delete routes with role and validation parity.
design: Depends on Tasks 5 and 9. Verification: Go tests and contract run for PR/comment routes.
acceptance_criteria: Pull request and comment DTOs preserve legacy schemas; comment ordering and creator role are stable; unsupported methods return expected status.

title: Add authenticated WebSocket comments and token redaction
description: Source: plan Task 12. Scope: implement authenticated WS comments endpoint, broadcast semantics, URL token redaction middleware/logger, logscan tool, and ws-redaction-probe.
design: Depends on Task 11. Verification: realtime/logger tests, ws-redaction-probe with valid sentinel token, logscan over capture dir.
acceptance_criteria: Valid minted JWT succeeds over WS; invalid/expired tokens fail as legacy expects; no raw token sentinel appears in captured logs or errors.

title: Add lineup compatibility routes
description: Source: plan Task 9. Scope: implement lineup list/detail/create/update/delete routes, derived fields, validation, ownership/permission checks, and contract coverage.
design: Depends on Tasks 7 and 8. Verification: route tests and golden contract run for lineup workflows.
acceptance_criteria: Lineup workflows preserve frontend schemas, computed fields, validation errors, and auth behavior for current user roles.

title: Add properties and favorites compatibility routes
description: Source: plan Task 10. Scope: implement properties, property-list links, favorites, toggles, pagination/filter behavior, and cache-aware tests.
design: Depends on Task 9. Verification: Go tests and contract run for properties/favorites.
acceptance_criteria: Property and favorite workflows preserve legacy DTOs/statuses/errors, including duplicate, missing, unauthorized, and empty states.

title: Add users and grenade class compatibility routes
description: Source: plan Task 7. Scope: implement public users and grenade class routes, DTOs, filters/pagination/error parity, and contract coverage.
design: Depends on Tasks 5 and 6. Verification: Go tests and golden contract run for users/classes.
acceptance_criteria: Routes match legacy schemas/statuses/errors for list/detail/search/empty/not-found cases used by the frontend.

title: Add golden contract harness
description: Source: plan Task 6. Scope: build contract runner for legacy-vs-Go route corpus, request normalization, ignored volatile fields, diff output, and CI/local commands.
design: Depends on Task 1. Verification: contract harness self-tests and a passing baseline run against legacy fixtures.
acceptance_criteria: Harness can compare legacy and Go responses for public/API/admin-denial paths; diffs are actionable; route corpus maps to approved manifest.

title: Add media storage and map routes
description: Source: plan Task 8. Scope: implement media storage abstraction, map list/detail/media routes, upload/static URL handling, and compatibility tests.
design: Depends on Tasks 5 and 6. Verification: media/map tests, contract run, local asset smoke.
acceptance_criteria: Frontend map browsing/detail/media assets keep existing URL/schema behavior; missing media and invalid IDs match legacy responses.

title: Add database migrations and sqlc skeleton
description: Source: plan Task 4. Scope: add Goose migrations, PostgreSQL schema, identity/sequence strategy, sqlc config, query skeleton, and reset/seed developer workflow.
design: Depends on Task 2. Verification: migration up/down, sqlc generate, sequence tests for explicit ID import.
acceptance_criteria: Schema supports all approved public/admin data shapes; explicit migrated IDs are compatible with later implicit inserts; migration up/down and sqlc generation pass.

title: Add auth compatibility
description: Source: plan Task 5. Scope: implement JWT/session/password compatibility, auth DTOs, current-user route, permission helpers, token expiry/error parity, and tests against legacy contract.
design: Depends on Tasks 2 and 4. Verification: auth unit/integration tests plus golden contract comparisons.
acceptance_criteria: Existing frontend login/logout/current-user flows keep the same schemas and error behavior; role source is server-side, not client-trusted.

title: Add write gate middleware and production default
description: Source: plan Task 3. Scope: implement configurable write gate middleware, production default read-only behavior before parity, admin bypass rules only where specified, and tests for blocked/enabled methods.
design: Depends on Task 2. Verification: middleware unit/integration tests and production config inspection.
acceptance_criteria: Unsafe methods are denied by default in production until explicitly enabled; read routes continue; environment/config documentation names the release gate.

title: Scaffold Go backend foundation
description: Source: plan Task 2. Scope: add backend/ Go module layout, config, logger, db/cache/http scaffolding, chi/cors/health server, Dockerfile, and docker-compose wiring while keeping frontend proxy paths stable.
design: Depends on Task 1. Verification: go test ./..., docker compose health check, frontend proxy smoke.
acceptance_criteria: Go service exposes /healthz and /api/healthz; frontend can proxy to Go backend; gofmt/go test pass; no public route behavior beyond health is claimed.

title: Go backend rewrite and custom admin migration
description: Source: approved Go backend rewrite spec and implementation plan. Scope: replace the DRF backend with a Go service, preserve frontend-facing public schemas, add a custom Go+React admin, migrate production data, and rehearse release/rollback.
design: Trace: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-18-golang-backend-rewrite-design.md; docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-18-golang-backend-rewrite.md. Keep child issues aligned with plan task numbers and update Beads if the approved plan changes.
acceptance_criteria: All child issues are complete, contract/E2E/migration/release checks pass, and the legacy DRF backend is no longer required for production traffic.

title: Preserve legacy Django contract baseline
description: Source: plan Task 1. Scope: create legacy Django compose/docker baseline, fixtures, route inventory, response corpus, snapshot refresh guard, and manifest for public/API/admin/admin-expected-denial contracts.
design: Verification: legacy compose up, pytest against legacy backend, contract snapshot generation, manifest review.
acceptance_criteria: Legacy baseline starts independently; normalized contract corpus and manifest exist; snapshot refresh is explicit and reviewed; current legacy pytest/API snapshot commands pass.

title: Update Docker nginx OpenAPI and docs
description: Source: plan Task 21. Scope: update deployment compose, nginx routing, OpenAPI/docs, environment variables, admin/public app routing, and rollback/runbook docs.
design: Depends on Go service, WS, and admin scaffold. Verification: compose config/build checks, nginx route smoke, docs/OpenAPI review.
acceptance_criteria: Deployment config serves Go backend and separate admin app; docs describe migration, gates, rollback, env, and verification commands.

title: Add admin lineups UI
description: Source: plan Task 18. Scope: implement admin lineup list/detail/create/edit/delete UI, derived-field display, filters, and role-aware controls.
design: Depends on Tasks 15, 14, and 9. Verification: frontend tests and lineup CRUD smoke.
acceptance_criteria: Admin lineup workflows preserve backend validation semantics and make unauthorized actions unavailable or visibly rejected.

title: Add admin users and roles UI
description: Source: plan Task 19. Scope: implement admin users/roles screens, role assignment controls, access-control states, and audit-friendly UI behavior.
design: Depends on Tasks 15 and 14. Verification: frontend tests and users/roles access-control smoke.
acceptance_criteria: Only authorized admin roles can view/change user roles; denied states and API errors are handled without client-side role trust.

title: Add admin maps classes and properties UI
description: Source: plan Task 17. Scope: implement admin UI for maps, grenade classes, properties, property links, media fields, filters, forms, and validation/error states.
design: Depends on Task 15 and admin API. Verification: frontend tests and CRUD smoke.
acceptance_criteria: Admins can browse and CRUD supported content without breaking public schemas; validation and permission errors are visible.

title: Add admin moderation UI
description: Source: plan Task 16. Scope: implement moderation queue/detail UI, PR approval controls by role, comments panel, create-comment form, role-aware delete controls, and 403 rendering.
design: Depends on Task 15 and admin API comments. Verification: component tests plus browser smoke for moderation and comments.
acceptance_criteria: Admin moderation workflows and comment actions match role permissions; unauthorized controls are hidden/disabled and backend 403 is rendered coherently.

title: Scaffold admin frontend
description: Source: plan Task 15. Scope: create separate React admin app, routing, auth integration, API client, layout/navigation, and build/dev scripts without coupling it to the public frontend.
design: Depends on Task 14. Verification: admin frontend unit/build checks and manual login smoke.
acceptance_criteria: Admin app can log in, preserve session, call admin API, render protected shell, and handle unauthorized/expired states.

title: Add cache layer and invalidation
description: Source: plan Task 13. Scope: add Redis/cache facade, cache keys, invalidation on writes, cache tests, and documented failure behavior.
design: Depends on completed public route implementations. Verification: cache unit/integration tests and contract run with cache enabled.
acceptance_criteria: Cached public reads remain schema-compatible; writes invalidate affected data; Redis outage falls back or fails exactly as specified in the plan.

title: Install archived Codex skills and capture project memory
close_reason: Installed archived skills, updated AGENTS.md, captured Grace memory; checks: skill files listed, __MACOSX absent, AGENTS and memory headings verified, bd list verified
